headline: Xcel Energy seen as undervalued as UBS lifts price target
summary: Xcel Energy Inc (NASDAQ:XEL) had its price target raised to $91 from $89 by UBS analysts who say the stock continues to offer upside driven by earnings growth visibility and what it views as an overly discounted assessment of wildfire-related risk. The revised target implies about 12% upside...

headline: Barclays Maintains Overweight on Xcel Energy, Raises Price Target to $91
summary: Barclays  analyst Nicholas Campanella   maintains Xcel Energy (NASDAQ:XEL) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $82 to $91.

headline: Keybanc Maintains Overweight on Xcel Energy, Raises Price Target to $90

headline: Truist Securities Initiates Coverage On Xcel Energy with Buy Rating, Announces Price Target of $95
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Richard Sunderland   initiates coverage on Xcel Energy (NASDAQ:XEL) with a Buy rating and announces Price Target of $95.
